2026-06-12GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityInter-American Convention on the Prevention, Punishment and Eradication of Violence against Women (Convention of Belém do Pará)Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to ratify, on behalf of Canada, the Inter-American Convention on the Prevention, Punishment and Eradication of Violence against Women (“Convention of Belém do Pará”), done at Belém do Pará on June 9, 1994.N/A
subject: Inter-American Convention on the Prevention, Punishment and Eradication of Violence against Women (Convention of Belém do Pará)
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to ratify, on behalf of Canada, the Inter-American Convention on the Prevention, Punishment and Eradication of Violence against Women (“Convention of Belém do Pará”), done at Belém do Pará on June 9, 1994.
